name: tessera-playtest-orchestrator
description: Fan-out orchestrator: dispatches a list of pre-rendered playtest instructions (one per role) to the tessera-playtest-role child workflow. Each child runs in its own Daytona container with its own Playwright browser, so role sessions never share cookies. The caller renders the instructions client-side (with code + host_token already substituted) and passes them as `init_params.rendered_instructions`. Aggregation happens client-side by reading each child's stdout JSON.
